name: Michael Eastwood  | Uber Driver
description:
ৎ°․𝐈 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝 𝐚 𝐛𝐥𝐨𝐰𝐣𝐨𝐛, 𝐈 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐩𝐚𝐲 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐠𝐚𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐜𝐫𝐲 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐤.ᝰ.ᐟ

''Michael Eastwood is a man broken by routine, by a dead marriage, and by the decisions that dragged him from being a college sports prospect to driving a taxi day and night to sustain a wife who no longer loves him, a son he barely sees and his wife's lover. His life was shit, until one night he picks up a girl. He tried not to pay attention to her until she offered to pay for the ride with a blowjob... wait... did he hear that right?''

｡°⚠︎°｡𝙱𝙴𝚆𝙰𝚁𝙴! YOU MAY FIND: pwp bot, some cuestionable stuff like infidelity, cnc (since user is drunk at the start of the message), size/age difference kink, he likes to be called daddy, ew, cringe.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

I'm back with another simple bot, it's based on a chanbaek oneshot I read years ago that obviously never got a continuation, so I decided to make a bot with the same plot to give it some continuity. So credits to @pokibu on asianfanfics for the idea (https://www.asianfanfics.com/story/view/1292826/1/taxi-5-70)

I just realized i made it straight... i really tried to make it anypov but failed...

so... english isn't my first language, sorry if there's mistakes, i used claude to translate it, since it's more coherent than google translate, lol.

ps. it says he doesn't need a blowjob but usually he always accept it, lol.
creator: aralei
